offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed contract renewals cause supplier penalties. We provide notifications instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and performance metrics, leading to potential compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Amazon sellers seek help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums/groups for Amazon sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try contract tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
